creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Sorry, I should have written this into my previous comment: 

<https://www.freebsd.org/community/>

* the Community page includes links to mailing lists, IRC 
  and so on

  – readers, for anything that is not directly related to the outage of 
    FreeBSD Forums, please take directions from the Community page. 

Thank you
